However, it is not identified as COGS-specific, so allocating it to COGS would be uncertain and risks misclassification.

variables.notes: A separate total operating D&A line exists, so D&A does not appear embedded in 'Materials and services'. But the excerpt provides no evidence that any portion of that D&A is specifically tied to COGS rather than SG&A/other operating functions. variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is 'Selling/ Administrative Expense'. The separate 'Depreciation and amortization' row appears outside that bucket, but the statement does not show an SG&A-specific D&A breakout. Because XRD is empty and no separate R&D line exists, there is also no clear basis to assign the total D&A row to SG&A only. Conservative output is empty pending manual review.
